caption:
Six sessions. One decision that changed everything.

This patient started laser hair removal on her underarms and bikini area six months ago. Her experience before treatment: daily shaving, constant razor burn, ingrown hairs, and skin irritation that never fully healed.

Today: smooth, clear skin with no maintenance required.

Here's what her treatment timeline looked like:

Session 1-2: Noticeable reduction in hair density (~30%)
Session 3-4: Regrowth becomes sparse and finer
Session 5-6: Remaining follicles treated. Results are lasting.

Total time investment: Six sessions over 8 months.
Total time saved: Every single day for the rest of her life.

The math speaks for itself.

Start your laser journey at Rani. Consultation link in bio.
mediaDescription: Timeline-style carousel showing the progressive reduction over 6 sessions. Each slide represents a session milestone with percentage reduction noted. Final slide shows the smooth result. Clinical documentation style with Rani luxury branding overlay.
